01 — Projects

Engineering Projects

Masters Thesis · Ongoing 2025–2026
Lab-On-A-Disc DNA Analysis System

Final thesis project for the MEng in Mechanical and Manufacturing Engineering at DCU. Designing a centrifugal microfluidic platform for automated DNA extraction — combining magnetophoresis, magnetic bead-based separation, and a custom mechatronic actuation system. Targeting point-of-care diagnostics for the MedTech sector.

Centrifugal Microfluidics Magnetophoresis DNA Extraction Mechatronic Design SolidWorks Dublin City University
Project 01 · Healthcare

Smart Wheelchair with Multi-Mode Control

Designed and 3D-modelled an adjustable LIDAR mount and Raspberry Pi enclosure in SolidWorks. Collaborated with the motor team to synchronise motors via Arduino IDE, enabling three distinct control modes — joystick, voice command, and autonomous navigation.

SolidWorksArduinoLIDARRaspberry PiPrototyping
🥇 1st Place · NITTE Healthcare Innovation Hackathon · ₹50,000 prize
Project 02 · AgriTech

Soil Nutrient Testing Device

Designed a device to read soil macronutrients and suggest growable plants. Full 3D CAD in SolidWorks, fabricated via 3D printing. Achieved 90% accuracy against laboratory reference testing.

SolidWorks3D PrintingSensorsSustainability
🥈 2nd Place · Magnovite National Inter-Collegiate Competition, Christ University
Project 03 · Automotive

Smart Tire Inflation Control System

Automatic tire pressure management system adjusting inflation based on drive mode. Designed the weldment frame CAD in SolidWorks, built the full working prototype and integrated all electronic circuitry.

SolidWorksWeldmentElectronicsPrototyping
📋 Provisional Patent Secured
Project 04 · Product Design

Sanitary Pad Vending Machine

Led a multidisciplinary team to design and build a coin-operated vending machine using SolidWorks sheet metal design features. 24-pad capacity with Arduino-controlled dispensing and refill alert system.

SolidWorksSheet Metal DesignArduinoTeam Lead
Fully functional prototype — 40% improvement in user satisfaction
Project 05 · Robotics

Curio — Campus Navigation Robot

Designed the robot body cover in SolidWorks and laser-cut it from acrylic sheets. Assembled the metal frame using power tools. Deployed in the college administrative block with a touch interface for navigation.

SolidWorksLaser CuttingAcrylic FabRobotics
Live deployment in college administrative block
Project 06 · Competitive CAD

Precision Damper System — CAD Carnival

Designed a fully detailed precision damper system in SolidWorks under strict time constraints at the Aerophilia National Techno Fest, competing against students from across India.

SolidWorksGD&TSpeed DesignCompetition
🥈 2nd Place · CAD Carnival, Aerophilia National Techno Fest
